query:
DELETE FROM votes v
                    USING session s
                    JOIN race_weekend rw ON s.weekend_id = rw.id
                    WHERE v.session_id = s.id
                        AND rw.grand_prix_id = $1
                        AND rw.year = $2
                        AND s.session_type = 'race'
                        AND v.vote_type = $3
                        AND v.user_identifier LIKE $4 || '%'
